goal: CLI family: 'gad env get <KEY> --projectid', 'gad env set <KEY> --projectid' (reads value from prompt, not argv, to avoid shell history), 'gad env list --projectid' (keys + metadata, never values), 'gad env rotate <KEY> --projectid', 'gad env revoke <KEY> --projectid'. All operations require master-key unlock.
